title: NOOPEPT
description: Noopept is a potent synthetic nootropic developed in Russia, approximately 1000x more potent than piracetam by weight. It enhances memory, learning, and provides neuroprotective effects through BDNF and NGF modulation.

research.title: Noopept in the treatment of mild cognitive impairment in patients with stroke
research.summary: Study of 60 stroke patients treated with noopept 20 mg daily for 12 months showed significant cognitive improvements after 2 months.

research.title: Clinical and electroencephalographic characteristic of noopept in patients with mild cognitive impairment
research.summary: Research examined noopept's impact on brain activity, finding increased alpha- and beta-rhythm power while reducing delta-rhythm power.

research.title: Effect of nootropic dipeptide noopept on CA1 pyramidal neurons involves α7AChRs
research.summary: Noopept enhances hippocampal neuron activity by boosting inhibitory interneuron firing through nicotinic acetylcholine receptors.

research.title: Effects of noopept on cognitive functions and pubertal process in rats with diabetes
research.summary: Noopept normalized delayed puberty and reduced blood glucose levels in diabetic rats, improving insulin resistance markers.

research.title: QbD-driven development of dissolving microneedle patch loaded with ultradeformable liposomes encapsulated Noopept
research.summary: Development of transdermal microneedle delivery system for noopept showed enhanced bioavailability and skin penetration.

research.title: Neuroprotective and Nootropic Drug Noopept Rescues α-Synuclein Amyloid Cytotoxicity
research.summary: Noopept mitigates harmful effects of α-synuclein linked to Parkinson's disease by promoting safer aggregation forms.

research.title: Novel nootropic dipeptide Noopept increases inhibitory synaptic transmission in CA1 pyramidal cells
research.summary: Research found noopept increases inhibitory signal frequency in hippocampal brain cells through activation of specific inhibitory neurons.

research.title: Noopept stimulates the expression of NGF and BDNF in rat hippocampus
research.summary: Noopept increases neurotrophic factor expression in the hippocampus, potentially enhancing cognitive functions.

sentiment.summary: Users appreciate its potency and cognitive benefits. Some report anxiety reduction while others experience increased stimulation. Individual response varies significantly.

effects.label: Fast Onset:
effects.description: Effects often felt within an hour.

effects.label: Individual Variation:
effects.description: Response can be stimulating or calming.

dosage.label: Sublingual:
dosage.description: Can be taken sublingually for faster onset.

sideEffects.label: Brain Fog:
sideEffects.description: Paradoxically, some experience this at wrong doses.

availability.label: Affordable:
availability.description: Very cost-effective due to low dosing.
